title: Get the invoices of a BC
content:
Use this endpoint to get invoices of a Business Center account. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform invoice related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{20%}|v1.2{30%}|v1.3{50%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/invoice/get/| /v1.3/bc/invoice/get/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`invoice_id`: number |`bc_id`: string
`invoice_id`: string | |Response parameter data type|`invoice_id`: number|`invoice_id`: string| |Response parameter name |`bg_id`
`area_code` |`billing_group_id`
`country_code`| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&invoice_types=["CREDIT"]&page_size=50 --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' (/code) ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |invoice_id |string| Invoice ID.| |invoice_title|string|Invoice title.| |invoice_types{Required}|string[]| Invoice types.

Enum values:
  • `RECON`: Reconciliation Invoice.
  • `CREDIT`: Credit Invoice.
  • `AUTO_PAY`: Automatic Payment Invoice.

Note: `AUTO_PAY` cannot be used with other invoice types. To filter Automatic Payment Invoices, set `invoice_types` to `["AUTO_PAY"]`. | |pay_statuses|string[]| Payment statuses of the invoices. Enum values: `UNPAID`, `PAID`, `PARTIAL_PAID`, `NO_NEED`(No need to pay).| |start_time|string|The start time for the invoice issuance, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`.

Example: `2024-01-01 00:00:00`.

You must specify both `start_time` and `end_time` or neither.| |end_time|string|The end time for the invoice issuance, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`.

Example: `2024-02-01 00:00:00`.

You must specify both `start_time` and `end_time` or neither.| |page|number| Page number. Default value: 1.| |page_size|number|Page size, in the range of 1-50. Default value: 10.| ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| #|list|object[]|List of invoices.| ##|invoice_id|string|Invoice ID.| ##|serial_number|string| Invoice serial number. | ##|subject_id|number|Contract subject ID.| ##|send_date|string|Invoice issue date, in the format of YYYY-MM-DD. | ##|currency_code |string|Currency.| ##|status|string| Invoice approval status. Enum values: `CREATED`, `SUBMITTED`, `APPROVED`, `DELETED`.| ##|due_date |string|Invoice due date.| ##|invoice_type |string| Invoice type.

Enum values:

  • `RECON`: Reconciliation Invoice.
  • `CREDIT`: Credit Invoice.
  • `AUTO_PAY`: Automatic Payment Invoice.
| ##|entity_serials |string[]|Entity serial numbers associated with the invoice.| ##|negative_invoice_ids |object[]|ID and serial number of the associated negative invoices that has been approved, returned when the current invoice is a positive invoice and has been reversed.| ###|invoice_id|string|Invoice ID of the associated negative invoices.| ###|serial_number|string| Invoice serial number of the associated negative invoices. | ##|positive_invoice_ids |object[]|ID and serial number of the associated positive invoices, returned when the current invoice is a negative invoice.| ###|invoice_id|string|Invoice ID of the associated positive invoices.| ###|serial_number|string| Invoice serial number of the associated positive invoices. | ##|billing_group_id |string|Billing Group ID of the invoice.| ##|account_name |string|Account name.| ##|invoice_title |string|Invoice title.| ##|country_code |string|Location code.| ##|address |string|Account billing address.| ##|emails |string[]|A list of email addressess from invoice for billing. | ##|tax_id1 |string|ID number of the first tax type of the invoice.| ##|tax_id2 |string|ID number of the second tax type of the invoice.| ##|amount |number|Total amount, including tax.| ##|amount_excluding_tax |number|Total amount, excluding tax| ##|total_tax_amount|number|Total tax amount, in the same currency of the invoice.| ##|tax_type1|string|The first tax type of the invoice.| ##|tax_rate1|number|Rate of the first tax type.| ##|tax_amount1|number|Amount of the first tax type.| ##|tax_type2|string|The second tax type of the invoice.| ##|tax_rate2|number|Rate of the second tax type.| ##|tax_amount2|number|Amount of the second tax type.| ##| pay_status|string|Payment statuses of the invoices.| ##|overdue_status|string|Overdue status. Enum values: `INITIALIZED`, `YES`, `NO`.| ##| unpaid_amount|number|Unpaid amount.| #|page_info|object| Pagination information.| ##|page|number| Current page number.| ##|page_size| number | Page size.| ##|total_number| number | Total number of results. | ##|total_page| number | Total pages of results.| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "account_name": "{{account_name}}", "address": "{{address}}", "amount_excluding_tax": 293.5, "status": "APPROVED", "amount": 293.5, "positive_invoice_ids": [ { "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}" } ], "country_code": "VG", "invoice_type": "CREDIT", "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}-CN", "invoice_title": "{{account_name}}", "currency_code": "USD", "unpaid_amount": 293.5, "emails": [ "{{email}}", "{{email}}" ], "billing_group_id": "{{billing_group_id}}", "entity_serials": [ "{{entity_serial}}" ] }, { "account_name": "{{account_name}}", "address": "{{address}}", "amount_excluding_tax": 179, "status": "APPROVED", "amount": 179, "positive_invoice_ids": [ { "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}" } ], "country_code": "VG", "invoice_type": "CREDIT", "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}-CN", "invoice_title": "{{account_name}}", "currency_code": "USD", "unpaid_amount": 179, "emails": [ "{{email}}", "{{email}}" ], "billing_group_id": "{{billing_group_id}}", "entity_serials": [ "{{entity_serial}}" ] } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 50, "total_page": 1, "total_number": 8 } } } (/code) ```
